task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change, but I only have a rough draft right now. Can you help me turn it into a short message I could send today?

turns.agent_response: Absolutely — paste your rough draft here, and I’ll turn it into a short, polished message you can send today.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, here’s the rough draft:

Hi [Supervisor Name], I wanted to let you know I won’t be able to make my usual shift on [day] because of a schedule change. I’m sorry for the inconvenience. If needed, I can work [alternate day/time] instead.

Keep it short, plain, and not too formal.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a shorter, plain version you can send:

Hi [Supervisor Name], I wanted to let you know I can’t make my usual shift on [day] because of a schedule change. Sorry for the inconvenience. I’m available [alternate day/time] if that helps.

If you want, I can also make it a little more casual or a little more professional.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and plain, just like I wanted.
